papers.title: Video Friday: Beep! Beep! Roadrunner Bipedal Bot Breaks the Mold
papers.title_zh: Video Friday: Beep! Beep! Roadrunner Bipedal Bot Breaks the Mold
papers.tldr_zh: Video Friday is your weekly selection of awesome robotics vi
papers.cover_zh: Video Friday is your weekly selection of awesome robotics vi
papers.abstract_zh: Video Friday is your weekly selection of awesome robotics videos, collected by your friends at IEEE Spectrum robotics. We also post a weekly calendar of upcoming robotics events for the next few months. Please send us your events for inclusion. ICRA 2026 : 1–5 June 2026, VIENNA RSS 2026 : 13–17 July 2026, SYDNEY Summer School on Multi-Robot Systems : 29 July–4 August 2026, PRAGUE E
